templates.querydescription: MPD Bundle viewer — renders MedicationRequest, MedicationDispense, Medication, RequestGroup, Patient, and supporting EU MPD resources
MedicationRequest viewer — renders a single prescription with dosage, dispense request, and references
MedicationDispense viewer — renders a dispense event with quantity, whenHandedOver, and substitution
Validation outcome viewer — renders errors, warnings, and information from $validate operations
